name: Keleres+
description: The Keleres and Drahn factions have come to provide assistance to any and all galactic powers.
overview: The Keleres+ mini expansion expands the Keleres faction hero suite, and introduces a new faction, the Drahn, which operates as a sort of anti-Keleres, with its own host of faction heroes.

blocks.content: The **Drahn Cartel** is an expansion faction for the Twilight Imperium 4th Edition boardgame.

blocks.subtitle: The back and lore of the Drahn faction

Drahn/Drahn Agent Front.jpg.description:
*Contract Broker*
You may exhaust this card at the start of a player's turn; that player may either gain 1 command token or draw 1 secret objective. If they do, end that player's turn.
Drahn/Drahn Agent Front.jpg.title: Aldo Graft

Drahn/Drahn Alliance Front.jpg.description:
After you resolve a tactical action:
You may spend 3 trade goods to move 1 of your ships from the active system to an adjacent system that does not contain another player's ships.
Drahn/Drahn Alliance Front.jpg.subtitle: Smugglers' Network
Drahn/Drahn Alliance Front.jpg.title: Drahn Alliance

Drahn/Drahn Breakthrough BR.jpg.description:
When you gain this card, gain the Nevermore planet card and its legendary planet card.
You are neighbors with all palyers who have units on anomalies that do not contain planets.
Drahn/Drahn Breakthrough BR.jpg.subtitle: The Drahn Cartel
Drahn/Drahn Breakthrough BR.jpg.title: V.D.H.Q. Consolidation

Drahn/Drahn Commander Front.jpg.description:
After you resolve a tactical action:
You may spend 3 trade goods to move 1 of your ships from the active system to an adjacent system that does not contain another player's ships.
Drahn/Drahn Commander Front.jpg.title: Kip Lok Sil

Drahn/Drahn Mech.jpg.description: Apply +1 to this unit's combat rolls for each secret objective you have scored.
Drahn/Drahn Mech.jpg.title: Contender

Drahn/Drahn Monument.jpg.description:
At the beginning of your turn you may remove this unit from this planet and place it onto a different valid planet you control.
Can only be placed on Industrial and Cultural planets.
Drahn/Drahn Monument.jpg.flavour: It is more a reminder of Drahn influence than a true monument.
Drahn/Drahn Monument.jpg.subtitle: Drahn Monument
Drahn/Drahn Monument.jpg.title: Koldan's Outpost

Drahn/Drahn Nevermore Ability Front.jpg.description:
When another player activates a system adjacent to Mecatol Rex, gain 1 trade good.

Gain 2 command tokens when another players draws a secret objective using the second bullet of "Imperial".
Drahn/Drahn Nevermore Ability Front.jpg.subtitle: Legendary Ability - Drahn
Drahn/Drahn Nevermore Ability Front.jpg.title: Nevermore

Drahn/Drahn Nevermore Front.jpg.flavour: Nevermore, the dark beating heart of the Drahn Cartel. Ten thousand people wander down its countless alleys every day, and the Drahn happily transact with them all.
Drahn/Drahn Nevermore Front.jpg.title: Nevermore

Drahn/Drahn Promissory Note.jpg.description: This promissory note has the ability text of 1 of your faction promissory notes of your choice, replacing any reference to your faction with that of the Drahn player.
Drahn/Drahn Promissory Note.jpg.title: Networking Officer

Drahn/Drahn Tech - Guild Fund.jpg.description:
After you resolve the primary ability of a strategy card, you may resolve the secondary ability of that strategy card.

When you would spend a command token, you may exhaust this card to spend 1 token from your reinforcements instead.
Drahn/Drahn Tech - Guild Fund.jpg.title: Guild Fund

Drahn/Drahn Tech - Special Forces.jpg.description:
**At the start of space combat in which you are the defender:**
You may exhaust this card and spend 1 token from your strategy pool to force your opponent to declare a retreat.
Drahn/Drahn Tech - Special Forces.jpg.title: Special Forces

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Arborec.jpg.description:
***ACTION***: Use the **PRODUCTION** value of each unit you control, reducing the total cost of the produced units by 12.
Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Arborec.jpg.subtitle: The Symphony Retuned
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Arborec.jpg.title: The Arboretum

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Belkosea.jpg.description: ***ACTION:*** Attach this card to a planet you control. Take a Belkosea super weapon card into your play areas and place its token on that planet. That token is a structure with the unit abilities and ability text of that card. If that structure is destroyed, purge this card and those superweapon components.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Belkosea.jpg.subtitle: Ultimate Decider
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Belkosea.jpg.title: Project Revelation

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Creuss.jpg.description:
**After you activate a system that contains or is adjacent to a wormhole:**
Place this card face-up near the game board. Until the end of this tactical action, you may treat each of your units as adjacent to the active system. At the end of this tactical action, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Creuss.jpg.subtitle: Inter-Dimensional Commerce
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Creuss.jpg.title: Wormhole Fabricators

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Crimson.jpg.description:
**When a player activates a system:**
Purge this card to place a destroyer in each system that contains a wormhole and no other player's units. If you do, each wormhole on the game boards is an Epsilon wormhole instead of its regular type until the end of this tactical action.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Crimson.jpg.subtitle: Reality Dysfunction
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Crimson.jpg.title: Hadronic Reknit

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Deepwrought.jpg.description:
***ACTION***: Each player, in the order of your choice, may research 1 technology. If they do, you may gain that technology or gain 1 command token.
Once all players have chosen, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Deepwrought.jpg.subtitle: Status Quo Overthrown
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Deepwrought.jpg.title: Unpublished Research

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Empyrean.jpg.description:
***ACTION:*** For each command token in your tactics pool, explore the frontier exploration deck once in a system that contains your ships and no planets. 
Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Empyrean.jpg.subtitle: Archives Restored
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Empyrean.jpg.title: Forgotten Star Charts

Drahn/Heroes/Active/FSC.jpg.description: ***ACTION:*** Choose up to 3 planets. For each of those planets, roll a die; destroy a number of ground forces on that planet equal to or less than the value you roll. Then, place.1 infantry from your reinforcements on each planet you control and purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/FSC.jpg.subtitle: Independent Revolutionaries
Drahn/Heroes/Active/FSC.jpg.title: Rebellion Flashpoint

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Firmament.jpg.description: At the start of your turn you may choose a system that contains a neighbor's units, then 1 of the following: that player destroys 3 of their units in that system; research 1 technology that player owns; your units gain +2 to combat rolls in combats against that player this turn. Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Firmament.jpg.subtitle: Uncertain Alliance
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Firmament.jpg.title: A Crack in the Facade

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Ghemina.jpg.description: After you resolve the primary ability of a strategy card, you may spend 1 command token from your strategy pool and purge this card to resolve the pimrary ability of that strategy card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Ghemina.jpg.subtitle: Twins Forever
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Ghemina.jpg.title: Twinned Leadership

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Ghoti.jpg.description: **At any time**: Purge this card and 1 of your unsecured secret objectives, if able, to gain 1 victory point.

faq.a: You don't start with any planets in your home system, it's fine.

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Ghoti.jpg.subtitle: All-Mother's Hope
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Ghoti.jpg.title: Objective Restoration

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Gledge.jpg.description:
***ACTION:***: Exhaust any number of your planets. For each planet you exhaust, gain a number of trade goods equal to 1 more than that planet's resource or influence value.
Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Gledge.jpg.subtitle: Earn the Right to Mine
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Gledge.jpg.title: Drilling Initiative

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Glimmer.jpg.description: ***ACTION:*** Place this card near the game board. Until the end of this game round, systems that contain anomalies and no other players ships ain **PRODUCTION 2** sa if they were units you control. At the start of the strategy phase, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Glimmer.jpg.subtitle: Anomalous Production
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Glimmer.jpg.title: Weavelink Integration

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Kyro.jpg.description:
***ACTION:*** Exhaust your and any number of other players' strategy cards, if able, without resolving any of their abilities.
Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Kyro.jpg.subtitle: Lockdown Order
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Kyro.jpg.title: Galactic Pandemic

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Naalu.jpg.description:
**At the start of the status phase:**
Purge this card and spend 1 command token from your strategy pool to score 1 public objective, if you fulfil its requirements.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Naalu.jpg.subtitle: Nefishh Implants
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Naalu.jpg.title: Telecognitive Operatives

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Nokar.jpg.description:
**At the end of the strategy phase:**
For each of your non-fighter ships on the game board, you may destroy that ship to gain a number of trade goods equal to that unit's cost value, and produce up to 2 units in a system that contains a planet you control.
Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Nokar.jpg.subtitle: Meeting Demand
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Nokar.jpg.title: Fire Sale

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Olradin.jpg.description: **ACTION**: Purge this card to gain 1 of the Olradin policy cards and exhaust up to 1 planet on the game board.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Olradin.jpg.subtitle: New Government
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Olradin.jpg.title: Political Reform

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Saar.jpg.description:
***ACTION:*** Remove each of your structures from the game board; place each of those structures on a planet you control; for each structure you place, replenish your commodities or convert all of your commodities to trade goods.
Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Saar.jpg.subtitle: Ragh Reborn
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Saar.jpg.title: Rapid Reorganization

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Xin.jpg.description: ***ACTION:*** For each player who controls a planet that contains your units, you may resolve the secondary ability of 1 of that player's strategy cards without spending a command token, or look at that player's hand of secret objectives. Then, purge this card.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Xin.jpg.subtitle: Balance Restored
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Xin.jpg.title: The Draught

Drahn/Heroes/Active/Yin.jpg.description:
**AFter you lose a combat:**
You may purge this card to force your opponent to destroy half of their units that participated in that combat, rounded down.
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Yin.jpg.subtitle: Counter-Propaganda
Drahn/Heroes/Active/Yin.jpg.title: Kolos Manifesto

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Augurs.jpg.description: When an objective is revealed, you may purge this card to discard that objective and reveal a new objective from the corresponding objective deck instead.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Augurs.jpg.subtitle: Make Your Own Future
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Augurs.jpg.title: Dissonant Visions

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Berserkers.jpg.description: ***ACTION:*** Place this card face-up near the game board. Until the end of this game round, you may preroll up to 2 of your fighter or infantry units' combat rolls during each round of combat, applying +1 to the results. At the end of this game round, purge this card.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Berserkers.jpg.subtitle: Valor or Death
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Berserkers.jpg.title: Skald's Song

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Celdauri.jpg.description: ***ACTION:*** Place this card face-up near the game board. Until the end of this game round, apply +2 to the **PRODUCTION** value of each of your units with **PRODUCTION**. At the end of this game round, purge this card.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Celdauri.jpg.subtitle: Emergency Orders
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Celdauri.jpg.title: Coordinated Production

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Cheiran.jpg.description:
***ACTION:*** Gather units from your reinforcements up to equal to your starting units. Place these units, in any combination, in the space area of systems that contain 1 of your structures and no other players' ships, or on planets you control.
Then, purge this card.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Cheiran.jpg.subtitle: Reserve Fleet
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Cheiran.jpg.title: Polemarch's Support

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Nomad.jpg.description:
**When another player scores a secret objective:**
If you fulfill the requirements of that objective, you may purge this card to draw 3 secret objectives.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Nomad.jpg.subtitle: Company Assistance
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Nomad.jpg.title: Hedged Providence

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Roh'Dhna.jpg.description: After an agenda is resolved, you may purge this card to produce 1 unit in each system that contains 1 of your units with **PRODUCTION**.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Roh'Dhna.jpg.subtitle: Emergency Protocols
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Roh'Dhna.jpg.title: Rushed Build Order

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Sarcosa.jpg.description: ***ACTION***: Purge this card to place up to 2 neutral dreadnoughts, 2 neutral cruisers, and 4 neutral fighters in a system adjacent to your units; resolve space combat in that system.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Sarcosa.jpg.subtitle: Pirate Fleet
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Sarcosa.jpg.title: Letters of Marque

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Ul.jpg.description: ***ACTION***: Purge this card to replace up to 4 of your infantry with mechs, and then up to 4 of your mechs with PDS units.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Ul.jpg.subtitle: The Awakening
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Ul.jpg.title: The Elysian Protocols

Keleres/Heroes/Active/Zealots of Rhodun..description: When researching a technology you may purge this card to ignore each prerequisite on that technology.
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Zealots of Rhodun..subtitle: Prohibition Exemption
Keleres/Heroes/Active/Zealots of Rhodun..title: Wisdom from the Vaults
